course_title: CAREER DEVELOPMENT FOR AAE & ABM MAJORS
description: Career and professional development geared toward the field of agricultural and applied economics or agricultural business management. Topics include resumes, cover letters, interviewing skills, internship and job applications, writing, career exploration, and networking. Panelists include faculty, alumni, and employers.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Sophomore standing and declared in Agricultural and Applied Economics or Agricultural Business Management BS

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Sophomore standing and declared in Agricultural and Applied Economics or Agricultural Business Management BS
